assistant_message.content:
{
"finding_id": "openscap_013",
  "rule_id": "Ensure Red Hat GPG Key Installed",
  "category": "safe_to_remediate",
  "confidence": 0.96,
  "rationale": "Installing or verifying the Red Hat GPG key restores package signature verification without affecting system availability or access.",
  "risk_factors": [
    "missing GPG key could impair package verification"
  ],
  "safe_next_steps": [
    "mount trusted installation media and import RPM-GPG-KEY-redhat-release",
    "verify key fingerprint matches official values",
    "ensure /etc/pki/rpm-gpg directory has appropriate permissions (0755)",
    "optionally automate import via subscription-manager"
  ],
  "requires_reboot": false,
  "touches_authn_authz": false,
  "touches_networking": false,
  "touches_filesystems": false
}
